# llama.cpp Version Pin
# ======================
# This file records the exact llama.cpp version used by ISHA AI.
# DO NOT update without full regression testing.

LLAMA_CPP_TAG=b4966
LLAMA_CPP_DIR=third_party/llama.cpp
BUILD_TYPE=STATIC
CPU_ONLY=true
GPU_LAYERS=0

# Build configuration
GGML_METAL=OFF
GGML_CUDA=OFF
GGML_VULKAN=OFF
GGML_OPENCL=OFF
LLAMA_NATIVE=ON
